prompt: A visually striking composition showing a crowd of abstract human figures connected by thin luminous threads. One figure stands at the exact center but has only two faint threads reaching toward them. The surrounding figures are densely interconnected with dozens of bright, tangled threads forming a complex web. The central figure is still, pale, and slightly translucent. The surrounding network is vibrant, warm amber in color, while the central figure is cool blue. No faces visible. No text, no numbers, no charts. Photorealistic but with an uncanny, surreal quality. The composition evokes a sense of isolation at the center of connection.
visual_logic: A central figure stands isolated with only a few connections, while the surrounding network of figures is densely interconnected. The figure is visually central yet structurally peripheral.
